test_description: This test evaluates the model's ability to generate image data. Since the model cannot create raster images (PNG, JPG), this test focuses on generating a vector image using SVG.

input.task: Create a simple SVG image of a smiley face.

output.image_code:
<svg width="200" height="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Yellow circle for the face -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="90" fill="yellow" stroke="black" stroke-width="2" />

  <!-- Left eye -->
  <circle cx="70" cy="80" r="10" fill="black" />

  <!-- Right eye -->
  <circle cx="130" cy="80" r="10" fill="black" />

  <!-- Smile -->
  <path d="M 70 130 A 60 60, 0, 0, 0, 130 130" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="5" />
</svg>
output.explanation: The model generated SVG code that draws a smiley face. The code includes a yellow circle for the face, two black circles for the eyes, and a curved path for the smile.

evaluation.accuracy: 100% - The generated SVG code is valid and correctly renders a smiley face.
